@graph.name: Startup Due Diligence in Uttar Pradesh | Virtual Auditor
@graph.description: Startup Due Diligence in Uttar Pradesh. From ₹50,000. FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV. Pre-investment due diligence for startups — financial, tax, . Contact +91 996

mainEntity.name: What does startup due diligence cover?

acceptedAnswer.text: Financial statements review, tax compliance check, FEMA/FDI status, cap table accuracy, related party transactions, and contingent liabilities.

mainEntity.name: How long does due diligence take?

acceptedAnswer.text: Standard due diligence: 2-3 weeks. Expedited: 7-10 days. Complex multi-entity: 4-6 weeks.

mainEntity.name: Do you work with both investors and startups?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. We represent both sides — investors seeking independent assessment, and startups preparing for fundraise.

mainEntity.name: Do you provide startup due diligence services in Uttar Pradesh?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Virtual Auditor serves clients across Uttar Pradesh from our offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai. We handle the complete process remotely with in-person meetings available at our nearest office. Contact +91 99622 60333.

mainEntity.name: What is the ROC jurisdiction for Uttar Pradesh?

acceptedAnswer.text: Companies registered in Uttar Pradesh fall under ROC Kanpur. Virtual Auditor handles all ROC filings for Uttar Pradesh-registered companies.

mainEntity.name: What is the stamp duty for company registration in Uttar Pradesh?

acceptedAnswer.text: Stamp duty in Uttar Pradesh: As per state schedule. Professional tax: Not applicable. Contact us for exact computation based on your authorised capital.
